mapper.select: SELECT b.*, m.nickname FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.member_id
SELECT b.*, m.nickname FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.member_id WHERE (b.title LIKE #{pattern} OR b.content LIKE #{pattern}) AND b.status = 'Y'
SELECT b.*, m.nickname FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.member_id = m.member_id WHERE b.board_id = #{board_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE board_id = #{board_id}
UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_date = NOW() WHERE board_id = #{board_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board( member_id, title, content, status ) VALUES( #{member_id}, #{title}, #{content}, 'Y' )
